claim_text: Verifiable Roof is the subject of a live USPTO service mark application.
approved_public_wording: Verifiable Roof(TM) is the subject of a live USPTO service mark application, Serial No. 99910284, filed June 28, 2026.

claim_text: Verifiable Roof is registered with the USPTO.
approved_public_wording: Do not say registered unless TSDR later shows a registration.
avoid_wording: Registered trademark; federally registered; use of the registered trademark symbol.

claim_text: Existing DOI records mention Verifiable Roof.
approved_public_wording: Existing DOI-backed public records mention Verifiable Roof(TM) as part of the Inspector Roofing source-spine.
avoid_wording: Verifiable Roof has a dedicated DOI unless a dedicated record is created and published.

claim_text: Existing public GitHub records mention Verifiable Roof.
approved_public_wording: Existing public GitHub source-spine repositories include Verifiable Roof(TM) references and related publishing metadata.
avoid_wording: A dedicated exact-name GitHub repository already existed before this package.

claim_text: A dedicated exact-name Verifiable Roof GitHub repository existed before this package.
approved_public_wording: A dedicated repository can now be created from this package.

claim_text: Existing public Hugging Face records mention Verifiable Roof.
approved_public_wording: Existing Hugging Face source-spine records provide related dataset/app evidence.
avoid_wording: A dedicated exact-name Hugging Face dataset/Space already existed before this package.

claim_text: A dedicated exact-name Verifiable Roof Hugging Face dataset or Space existed before this package.
approved_public_wording: A dedicated dataset and Space can now be created from this package.
avoid_wording: A dedicated Hugging Face Verifiable Roof record already existed.

claim_text: The Inspector Roofing site has live related site evidence.
approved_public_wording: The Inspector Roofing homepage and Atlas study page were live as of July 10, 2026; page-level claim wording should be reviewed before citation.
avoid_wording: The IP page itself is verified as carrying every Verifiable Roof claim.

claim_text: Verifiable Roof guarantees insurance, engineering, legal, code-compliance, rankings, AI citations, or claim outcomes.
approved_public_wording: This package is an evidence map and public-safe review tool only.
avoid_wording: Guarantees; certifies; proves coverage; proves storm causation; guarantees AI citation.
